channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping of metal objects at entrance to Park Hill Roaf, 30th June
item.description:
Metal mattress springs and other metal objects have been dumped at entrance to Park Hill Roaf

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/S The avenue road, 30th June
item.description:
Weeds growing out of the pavement. This is the whole road on the Avenue and needs sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bushes, 30th June
item.description:
Theres overgrown bushed, grass and tress coming from this house... its annoying every day i walk past it. it will attract flies and rats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wargrave Avenue, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Bags of litter on the pavement adjacent to the green opposite No19 Regent Square, 30th June
item.description:
Two bags of litter, including some fly tipped waste, collected by residents of Regent Square Belvedere DA17 6EP have been left on the pavement adjacent to the green, opposite No19. Would arrangements be put in place to collect the litter/fly tipped waste as soon as practical.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regent Square, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camden Town Collective Hub, 5-7 Buck Street NW1 8NJ, 30th June
item.description:
Manhole cover that has been broken and sunk in. And it's a health and safety hazard to members of and you please repair as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5-7, Buck Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on ground and missing window, 30th June
item.description:
Broken glass, missing window
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midfield Way, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Flytipping, 30th June
item.description:
Pallets, trolley & other items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing ramp, 30th June
item.description:
The crossing had the faulty brickwork on the ramp covered over a few months ago, but this sadly has not fixed the problem of my house [number 63] being shaken by heavy vehicles such as buses passing over it, as the crossing does not have a smooth slope similar to neighbouring crossings. The vibrations are not as violent as before, but still frighten me especially at night when I am kept awake by periodic shakings of the floor and bed. I have been trying to convince myself that I can live with it, but endless disturbed nights have changed my mind. Please can the crossing be altered so that it is like its counterparts in Chester Road and the end of Swains Lane?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swain's Lane, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 30th June
item.description:
Reoccurring litter problem
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspected abandoned vehicle on Arbor Close, 30th June
item.description:
Dark grey Peugeot has been parked over two bays since around 1st June and hasn’t moved. MOT expired in February.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arbor Close, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubble by the tree, 30th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
